message:
Fix memory leaks on parse errors using arena allocators

Use arena allocators in compileModule and extractImports to ensure all
allocations are cleaned up even when parsing fails partway through.
This eliminates memory leaks from:
- parseAttribute/parseSubscript when parse errors occur
- codegen allocations when compilation fails
- AST nodes from partially parsed modules

Previously, failed parses could leave orphaned AST nodes because
errdefers couldn't always clean up nodes that had been passed to
other functions. Arena allocators provide automatic bulk cleanup.
